productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Boy's King Green White Brown Kidswear
description: CompositionGreen, black and white striped round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with green ribbed neckline and graphic on the right side shorts: Khakhi shorts made of cotton fabric, with elasticated waist, two insert pockets on the front and back and patch pockets with flaps and on the sides near the hemlines Fittingtop: Regular98 cm (24-30 months)Shorts: Regular 98 cm (24-30 months)Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Bring out the happy little rockstar side in your little boy in this striped green and white tee and khakhi shorts combo from gini and jony. The guitar graphic and the "Baby rock star" lettering in silver on the chest, all add to the edgy vibe of this tee. Team this with the super comfy khakhi shorts and crocs footwear for happy, casual outings with your little one, while the pure cotton fabric stays soft on his skin and keeps him fresh and comfortable all day.
